story_batch_size.title: Story Batch Size
story_batch_size.description: Maximum number of stories emitted in this run.

countries.title: Countries
countries.description: Only scrape websites where country/location matches one of these values.

limit.title: Site Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of sites to process.

default_site_limit.title: Default Site Limit
default_site_limit.description: Fallback site cap used when limit/site filters are omitted.

enforce_safe_site_limit.title: Enforce Safe Site Limit
enforce_safe_site_limit.description: When true, actor applies default_site_limit for broad runs without filters.

offset.title: Site Offset
offset.description: Start offset when paging through configured sites.

max_pages.title: Max Pages
max_pages.description: Per-site page budget. Historical runs are capped unless allow_deep_historical=true.

chunk_id.title: Chunk ID
chunk_id.description: Optional external chunk identifier for run bookkeeping.

cutoff_date.title: Cutoff Date
cutoff_date.description: Optional ISO datetime or YYYY-MM-DD cutoff for historical mode.

allow_deep_historical.title: Allow Deep Historical
allow_deep_historical.description: Disable actor safety cap for historical max_pages.

sync_first.title: Sync Catalog First
sync_first.description: Upsert website catalog from YAML before scraping.

push_to_dataset.title: Push to Apify Dataset
push_to_dataset.description: Push records to APIFY_DEFAULT_DATASET_ID using APIFY_TOKEN.

include_records_in_output.title: Include Records in OUTPUT
include_records_in_output.description: When false, OUTPUT.json keeps metadata/counts but omits full records array.

output_json.title: Local Output JSON Path
output_json.description: Optional local path for run payload. OUTPUT.json is always written for actor output.
